# Chapter 14: Quantum information and quantum computing  (~100 pp)
- 14.1 Qubits and quantum gates (12) · 14.2 Quantum entanglement and Bell inequalities (10) · 14.3 Quantum algorithms: Shor, Grover, VQE (15) · 14.4 Quantum error correction (12) · 14.5 Quantum-classical hybrid: variational methods (10) · 14.6 Quantum computing platforms: trapped ions, transmons, photonics, neutral atoms (15) · 14.7 Post-quantum cryptography (8) · 14.8 Failure section: decoherence, quantum-noise, current limits as of 2026 (10) · 14.9 Reality check: where quantum computing actually delivers, where it does not (8)

**Archetype**: scaling, uncertainty, failure. **Project**: implement Grover's algorithm in Qiskit on simulated and real backends; characterise the quantum advantage envelope. **Exercises**: 25.
